query: -- MySQL 可视化埋点 — 全面测试脚本
-- 覆盖：parse / optimize / exec / undo_write / redo_prepare
CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS trace_test

CREATE TABLE t_account (
    id      INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    name    VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    balance DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    version INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1
) ENGINE=InnoDB

CREATE TABLE t_order (
    id      INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    uid     INT NOT NULL,
    amount  DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
    status  VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'pending',
    INDEX idx_uid (uid)
) EN

CREATE TABLE t_log (
    id      INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
        msg     TEXT,
    ts      TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
) ENGINE=InnoDB
INSERT INTO t_log (msg) VALUES ('Initial data seeded')
-- ── Session 1: 事务 + 转账（2PC：redo_prepare → binlog_write → redo_commit）──
UPDATE t_account SET balance = balance - 300, version = version + 1 WHERE id = 1
UPDATE t_account SET balance = balance + 300, version = version + 1 WHERE id = 2
-- ── Session 1: 批量插入触发 flush_dirty + page_read ──
UPDATE t_account SET balance = balance + 100 WHERE name = 'Carol'
-- ── Session 1: DELETE (undo_write for INSERT_OP via delete marking) ──
-- ── Session 1: 大查询，触发 index scan（optimize 多个 plan）──

SELECT a.name, o.amount, o.status
FROM t_account a
JOIN t_order o ON a.id = o.uid
WHERE a.balance > 0
ORDER BY a.balance DESC
LIMIT 10
-- ── Session 1: 事务中锁住一行（为 Session 2 做准备）──
UPDATE t_account SET balance = balance + 0 WHERE id = 1
-- 不提交！Session 2 会阻塞在这行上
-- MySQL 可视化埋点 — 全面测试脚本
-- 覆盖：parse / optimize / exec / undo_write / redo_prepare
CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS trace_test

CREATE TABLE t_account (
    id      INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    name    VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    balance DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    version INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1
) ENGINE=InnoDB

CREATE TABLE t_order (
    id      INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    uid     INT NOT NULL,
    amount  DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
    status  VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'pending',
    INDEX idx_uid (uid)
) EN

CREATE TABLE t_log (
    id      INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
        msg     TEXT,
    ts      TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
) ENGINE=InnoDB
INSERT INTO t_log (msg) VALUES ('Initial data seeded')
-- ── Session 1: 事务 + 转账（2PC：redo_prepare → binlog_write → redo_commit）──
UPDATE t_account SET balance = balance - 300, version = version + 1 WHERE id = 1
UPDATE t_account SET balance = balance + 300, version = version + 1 WHERE id = 2
-- ── Session 1: 批量插入触发 flush_dirty + page_read ──
UPDATE t_account SET balance = balance + 100 WHERE name = 'Carol'
-- ── Session 1: DELETE (undo_write for INSERT_OP via delete marking) ──
-- ── Session 1: 大查询，触发 index scan（optimize 多个 plan）──

SELECT a.name, o.amount, o.status
FROM t_account a
JOIN t_order o ON a.id = o.uid
WHERE a.balance > 0
ORDER BY a.balance DESC
LIMIT 10
-- ── Session 1: 事务中锁住一行（为 Session 2 做准备）──
UPDATE t_account SET balance = balance + 0 WHERE id = 1
-- 不提交！Session 2 会阻塞在这行上
UPDATE t_account SET balance = balance + 50 WHERE id = 1
UPDATE t_account SET balance = balance + 0 WHERE id = 1
SELECT SLEEP(4)  -- Hold lock for 4 seconds
UPDATE t_account SET balance = balance + 50 WHERE id = 1
